# Environment maps & Tank Farm materials

## HDRI
- `tankfarm_4k.exr` — [Abandoned Tank Farm 03](https://polyhaven.com/a/abandoned_tank_farm_03) from Poly Haven (CC0)

## PBR textures (`public/textures/tankfarm/`)
- [Rusty Metal](https://polyhaven.com/a/rusty_metal) — tank shells (CC0)
- [Metal Plate](https://polyhaven.com/a/metal_plate) — pipes, catwalks, caps (CC0)
- [Asphalt 02](https://polyhaven.com/a/asphalt_02) — yard ground (CC0)

All Poly Haven assets are CC0.
